settings.subtitle: Configure application parameters and limits

settings.otpWhatsappOnly: Only WhatsApp will be available. The channel selector will be hidden.

settings.otpWarning: Warning: at least one channel must be enabled.
settings.manageSlotsDesc: Configure time slots, capacities and per-user limits
settings.noSlotsSubtext: Tap + to create your first slot
settings.errDailyLimitMin: Daily devotee limit must be at least 1
settings.errValidityMin: Ticket validity must be at least 15 minutes
settings.errValidityMax: Ticket validity cannot exceed 480 minutes (8 hours)
settings.errSlotTimes: Start and end times are required (HH:MM)
settings.errSlotEndAfterStart: End time must be after start time
settings.errSlotDuration: Duration must be at least 1 minute
settings.errSlotMaxBookings: Max bookings must be at least 1
settings.errSlotMaxPerUser: Max bookings per user must be at least 1
settings.errOtpMin: At least one OTP channel must be enabled
settings.failedOtp: Failed to save OTP channel settings
settings.offlineModeEnabledDesc: Devices can queue operations locally and sync when connection returns
settings.offlineModeDisabledDesc: All operations require an active internet connection — offline attempts will fail immediately
settings.offlineModeDisableBody:
When offline mode is off, supervisors and sebayats will not be able to use the app without an active internet connection. Any attempt to create or process tickets while offline will fail immediately.

Are you sure you want to disable offline mode?
settings.offlineModePendingBody:
There are {{count}} operation(s) queued on this device waiting to sync.

Disabling offline mode means supervisors and sebayats will not be able to use the app without an active internet connection.

Do you want to disable offline mode anyway?
